description.unified: Deals of Attack Power as Physical Damage to enemies within range 2 times. The first hit knocks enemies down for [1.5 sec->1.8 sec] and reduces their Defense Penetration by [(added) 300 for 4 sec]. This skill applies Defense Penetration [(removed) 800 higher].
Removes all harmful effects from all allies and increases their Attack by 252(1+0.3Skill Level), Attack Speed by [10%->36%], and Physical Defense by 91(1+0.3Skill Level) for [8 sec->6 sec].

Charges forward and deals of Attack Power as Physical Damage 12 times to nearby enemies. Cannot be affected by status ailments while casting, and the final hit freezes enemies for [2 sec->2.4 sec] [(removed) and increases Physical DMG taken by 16% for 10sec].

Every second, Attack increases by 16(1+0.3Skill Level), Status Resistance by [10->30], and damage dealt to non-hero enemies by [1%->1.5%]. This effect stacks up to 20 times. At 20 or more stacks, Normal Attack damage increases by [(added) 100%].

dark.unified: During the duration, Attack Speed is additionally increased by [(added) 24%] [(removed) ATK increase amount increases by 50%].

light.unified: Cooldown is reduced by [3 sec->2 sec].

description.unified: [Vortex] increases DMG by [{0}%->50%], and its last hit increases the P.DMG the target takes by [{1}%->{0}%] for 10 sec.
[Enrage] Changes the max number of stacks to [40->30] and upon gaining 30 stacks, increases own DEF Penetration by {0}.

dark.unified: Recovers HP each second equal to 10% of Attack Power, and for every 1% HP lost, all damage taken is reduced by [0.5%->0.6%].

description.unified: Max HP increases by {0}%, and Normal Attacks have a 15% chance to deal additional Physical Damage equal to {1}% of Attack Power and freeze the target for [1 sec->2 sec].
